title: Oaktree Reaches $290 Billion in Assets Under Management
summary: Oaktree Capital Management announces achievement of $290 billion in global assets under management, reflecting strong investor confidence and successful deployment of capital across all strategies.

title: Oaktree Global Fund Exceeds Performance Targets
summary: The Oaktree Global Fund delivers exceptional returns in Q1 2026, significantly outperforming benchmarks through strategic credit and equity investments.

title: Oaktree Expands Real Assets Investment Team
summary: Oaktree Capital Management expands its real assets investment program with new initiatives in sustainable infrastructure and renewable energy projects globally.
